images.caption: Figure 1:Model capability dominates.Per-attempt accuracyp^\hat{p}vs. expected majority-vote score under Binomial voting atN=3,8,16,32N{=}3,8,16,32. Seven data points across four model families. At equalN=8N{=}8, the 8-point gap betweengpt-oss-120b(p^=0.69\hat{p}{=}0.69, score 39.3) andgpt-oss-20b(p^=0.61\hat{p}{=}0.61, score 31.0) dwarfs every prompt optimization (±\pm2 points). ScalingNNbeyond compute budget backfires:gpt-oss-20bdrops from 31.0 (N=8N{=}8) to 26 (N=32N{=}32) as per-attempt time shrinks.

Figure 2:Prompt diversity vs. score ongpt-oss-120b. Blue circles: individual baseline runs (N=21N{=}21). Black diamonds: configuration means. Shaded band: baseline±1​σ\pm 1\sigma. More diversity monotonically degrades performance.

Figure 3:Per-problemρ^\hat{\rho}vs.p^\hat{p}across four models. Circles: Qwen (N=16N{=}16); squares:gpt-oss-120b(N=8N{=}8); filled diamonds:gpt-oss-20b(N=8N{=}8); hollow triangles/diamonds: Nemotron-Super/gpt-oss-20b(N=3N{=}3, forcedρ^=−0.500\hat{\rho}{=}-0.500). All 19 computable points showρ^<0\hat{\rho}<0. Meanρ^=−0.122\hat{\rho}=-0.122forN≥7N{\geq}7. No correlation headroom for diversity strategies.
Figure 4:Qwen3.5-35B-A3Bablation on 10 local problems. Blue: baseline (8/108/10). Orange: underperform (7/107/10). Red: crashed. Nothing improves beyond baseline.

Figure 5:Complete ablation across all experiments. Blue: baseline (39.3). Orange: interventions. Yellow-orange: diversity mixer. Teal: N-ablation. Red/Purple: cross-model. Green dashed: baseline mean. No experiment reliably exceeds baseline.

Figure 6:AIMO competition progression. Orange bars: winner/top LB scores (29→\to34→\to46). Blue bar: this work (42). Red line: votersNN(48→\to64→\to8). High-NNvoting gives way to high-p^\hat{p}capability.

Figure 7:Left: score distributions. Baseline (μ=39.3\mu{=}39.3,σ=1.7\sigma{=}1.7, blue) vs. Mixer (μ≈39.0\mu{\approx}39.0,σ≈2.0\sigma{\approx}2.0, orange). Red dashed line: target score 42. Right: cumulative probability ofmax≥42\max\geq 42overKKsubmissions. Baseline:p≈0.056p{\approx}0.056per run. Mixer:p≈0.037p{\approx}0.037. Dotted line at 42 submissions used.
